new_jobs.title: Digital Marketing & Graphic Designer
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Graphic Designer will work under the direction of the Department Head and will be responsible for the following:

Duties and Responsibilities
Leading the design process for visual communication, including web and mobile applications, digital marketing materials, and other graphic design projects.
Creating visually compelling designs that ensure seamless user experiences (UX) and engaging user interfaces (UI).
Developing wireframes, prototypes, and design specifications for digital and print-based projects.
Designing marketing materials such as social media creatives, banners, flyers, brochures, and promotional graphics.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams (marketing, product management, and developers) to ensure design solutions meet both user needs and business goals.
Ensuring brand consistency across all visuals and user interface elements across digital touchpoints and marketing materials.
Conducting user research and usability testing to improve design decisions and optimize user experiences.
Staying updated with industry trends related to UX/UI design best practices, emerging technologies, and graphic design tools.
Impact of Results
Strengthening PARSA Technologies’ digital presence through user-centric designs and high-quality graphic content.
Improving user satisfaction and engagement by providing intuitive, functional, and aesthetically pleasing digital experiences.
Contributing to the company's ongoing success by driving design innovation in digital products and visual communication.

Job Requirements
Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering or Equivalent Subject
3+ years of experience in field operations, fintech, telecom
Strong communication and negotiation skills
Ability to work in field and travel frequently
Result-oriented with strong execution capability
Key Skills:
Advanced proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and other graphic design tools.
A strong understanding of UX/UI design principles, usability, accessibility best practices, and graphic design fundamentals.
Expertise in creating wireframes, prototypes, and detailed design documentation.
Strong creative skills in graphic design for various digital media, including marketing and promotional materials.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who meet the above requirements are invited to submit the following documents:
Updated CV
Cover Letter • Applications must be sent to: hr@naqdpay.af
Please clearly mention the Position Title and Vacancy Number (e.g., Digital Marketing & Graphic Designer – NP#0006) in the subject line of the email. Applications without a proper subject line may not be considered.
Application Deadline: two weeks after announcement
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further assessment.
The Company reserves the right to accept or reject any application without prior notice.
For any further information, you can contact +93728979703

expiring_today.title: Digital Banking Operation Manager (Re-announced)
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
Card Issuance and Management:
Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA.
Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management.
Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations.
Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution:
Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay.
Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks.
Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity.
Customer Service and Support:
Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues.
Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes.
Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response.
Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website.
Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products.
Business and Operations:
Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department.
Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities.
Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements.
Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management.
Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses.
Cross-functional Responsibilities:
Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives.
Support the rollout of new digital products and services.
Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting.
Reporting and Documentation:
Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems.
Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred).
Experience:
Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role.
Technical Competencies:
Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems.
Experience in settlement and dispute management.
Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.
Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms.
Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage.
Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS).
Other Skills:
Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities.
Excellent communication and coordination skills.
Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-018 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.

expiring_today.description:
About French Medical Institute for Mothers and Children (FMIC)
Established in 2006 through a partnership between the Government of Afghanistan, the Government of France, La Chaîne de l’Espoir, and the Aga Khan Development Network, FMIC has become Afghanistan’s leading tertiary healthcare institution and a regional centre of excellence. Operated by the Aga Khan University, FMIC delivers high-quality, patient-centred care in accordance with international standards while serving as a hub for education, research, and innovation.
Over the past two decades, FMIC has provided healthcare services to more than 2.6 million patients, performed over 6,000 cardiac surgeries, and introduced numerous medical advancements, including Afghanistan’s first open-heart surgery and a range of specialised diagnostic and treatment services. Through telemedicine, outreach programmes, and financial assistance initiatives, FMIC continues to expand access to quality healthcare for underserved populations across the country.
Beyond clinical care, FMIC plays a vital role in strengthening Afghanistan’s health system through the training of healthcare professionals, postgraduate medical education, and the promotion of innovation and evidence-based practice. As it enters its third decade of service, FMIC remains committed to excellence, equity, and sustainable healthcare development, improving health outcomes and transforming lives across Afghanistan and the region.

· Ensure compliance with organizational standards, security protocols, and policies.
· Support ICT projects throughout the project lifecycle.
· Prepare business cases, requirements documents, and process maps.
· Coordinate User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
· Monitor project deliverables and timelines.
· Develop Power Apps solutions.
· Automate processes using Power Automate.
· Create dashboards and reports using Power BI.
· Develop SharePoint Online solutions and intranet portals.
· Support Teams, Forms, and Power Pages integrations.
· Support integration between Microsoft 365 and third-party systems.
· Utilize APIs, connectors, and the Microsoft Graph API.
· Support upgrades, migrations, and system enhancements.
· Maintain solution designs and technical documentation.
· Develop user guides and training materials.
· Prepare management reports and dashboards.
· Participate in risk assessments and security reviews.
· Ensure data protection and governance requirements are met.

Periodic Responsibilities

expiring_today.title: IT Solaris System Administrator
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
The Oracle Solaris System Administrator will be responsible for setting up servers, installing servers, creating and implementing Linux configurations, networking servers, and troubleshooting.
The Oracle Solaris System Administrator looks after design, installation, maintenance, and retirement of the systems, application server, WebLogic Server, data, security of the systems that are at the core of the organization, This role is responsible for the Technical and server Administration for infrastructure: Designing, building and implementing IT infrastructure; Proving timely and high-quality completion of projects (Tasks and request and ensuring the IT infrastructure environment is up to data through proactive auditing and Patch management.

Duties and Responsibilities
Install, configure, upgrade, maintain, and troubleshoot Solaris, Linux, and Windows servers, operating systems, applications, and related infrastructure.
Manage Production (PR) and Disaster Recovery (DR) environments, including load balancing, server migration, resource sharing, high availability, redundancy, backups, and business continuity solutions.
Administer user accounts, Active Directory, storage systems (SAN, NAS, Oracle ZFS), virtual machines, and data center infrastructure.
Monitor system performance, availability, security, backups, patches, upgrades, and disaster recovery readiness to ensure maximum uptime and operational efficiency.
Provide technical support, automate routine administration tasks, maintain documentation, and manage incident and outage reporting.
Administer Oracle FCCM, Oracle OBDX, Oracle WebLogic Servers, Smart Banking systems, and other enterprise applications.
Collaborate with IT Security, Network, and vendor teams to maintain infrastructure integrity, security, compliance, and performance.
Monitor data center operations, maintain standards and procedures, and recommend infrastructure improvements and technology upgrades.
Data Center Responsibilities:
Oversee daily health monitoring and reporting of core data center infrastructure.
Maintain documentation and event logs for processes and activities.
Provide recommendations for procuring new data center equipment as needed.
Keeping track of developing trends in data center technologies.
Collaborating with IT Security and network teams on cybersecurity and network efficiency.
Make sure the Data Center standard procedure followed by the team, units and vendor
efficiently.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Minimum 5 years of experience in Solaris, Linux, Unix, and Windows system administration within enterprise or data center environments.
Strong knowledge of Active Directory, PowerShell scripting, virtualization, storage technologies, server hardware, operating systems, networking, security, and disaster recovery.
Excellent communication, documentation, reporting, and problem-solving skills.

Submission Guidelines
If you meet the above requirements, we are encouraging you to apply for this position. Please send us your CV along with a cover letter via email ( vacancies@fmfb.com.af ).
Please make sure that your email includes the vacancy ID as the subject line.
Note that, only the candidates who meet the requirements of the position will be shortlisted.
For more information, please visit the FMFB-A website: https://www.fmfb.com.af/jobs/it-solaris-system-administrator/ .

expiring_soon.title: Sourcing & Quotation Analyst
expiring_soon.category: Procurement and logistics, Information Technology, Business Development, Sales, Supply Chain Management
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary We are hiring a Sourcing & Quotation Analyst to join our remote team. This is a night shift role. Your shift starts at 5:00 PM Kabul time and runs for 8 hours, aligned with international business hours. Your day will revolve around three things: finding the right opportunities, sourcing the right items from the right vendors, and building clean quotations that win. You will spend most of your shift on calls and emails with international vendors, so strong English and confidence on the phone are non-negotiable. This role is for someone serious. Someone who wants to grow, works hard without being chased, and takes pride in getting the details right. If you are looking for a relaxed 9 to 5, this is not for you. If you want to build a real career and you are willing to put in the work, we want to talk to you. Duties and Responsibilities Opportunity Research Search online portals and platforms for new tenders, RFQs, and product opportunities. Read the requirements carefully and understand exactly what is being asked for. Shortlist the opportunities that fit and flag them to management. Item Sourcing Identify the correct manufacturers and authorized distributors for each item. Verify part numbers, specifications, and compliance requirements before reaching out. Find backup vendors for every key item so we are never stuck with a single source. Vendor Communication Call and email vendors during your shift to request quotes, confirm stock, lead times, and shipping terms. Ask sharp follow-up questions when a quote is incomplete or unclear. Follow up consistently until you have everything you need. No half-finished work. Quotation Preparation Organize vendor pricing in Excel or Google Sheets and compare properly. Build professional quotations using company templates. Triple check every number, SKU, quantity, and date before anything goes out. Coordination and Records Keep clean records of all vendor communication, quotes, and follow-ups. Update internal trackers and CRM tools daily. Work closely with management on final pricing and submission strategy. Never miss a deadline. Discipline and Work Ethic Log in on time. Every shift. Respond quickly on email, WhatsApp, and internal tools during your hours. Keep a professional tone in every vendor interaction. Own your work. No excuses, no shortcuts. Job Requirements Must-Have Fluent English. Spoken and written. You must be able to hold a clear, confident conversation on the phone with international vendors. This is not negotiable. Strong IT background. Comfortable with advanced Google search, Excel or Google Sheets (formulas, filters, sorting), email tools, cloud storage, and basic CRM systems. Sharp critical thinking. You can read a requirement, understand what is being asked, and spot gaps or risks in a vendor's quote. Night shift availability. Ready to work 5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time, Monday to Friday, without exception. Serious attention to detail. Numbers, SKUs, quantities, and dates must always be right. Discipline and work ethic. Self-driven, reliable, consistent. You do not need someone standing over you to get the work done. Confident on calls. Polite, professional, clear. No slang, no shortcuts. Hungry. You want to build something real and you are willing to put in the work to get there. Nice-to-Have Previous experience in procurement, sourcing, or supply chain. Exposure to international tenders or B2B quotation work. Experience with tender portals or sourcing platforms. Familiarity with Notion, ClickUp, Trello, or similar project management tools. Basic knowledge of IT hardware, industrial equipment, or logistics. Do Not Apply If You are looking for a 9 to 5. You cannot commit to the night shift. You need to be chased to finish work. Your English is weak and you plan to fake it on vendor calls. You cannot. Submission Guidelines Interested candidates should submit their updated CV along with a short introduction (2 to 3 paragraphs) explaining why they are a good fit for this role and confirming their availability for the night shift (5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time). Send applications to: procurement@vastglobelogistics.com Please write "Sourcing & Quotation Analyst Application" in the email subject line. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications without a proper introduction will not be considered.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking Operation Manager (Re-announced)
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
Card Issuance and Management:
Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA.
Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management.
Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations.
Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution:
Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay.
Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks.
Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity.
Customer Service and Support:
Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues.
Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes.
Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response.
Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website.
Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products.
Business and Operations:
Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department.
Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities.
Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements.
Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management.
Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses.
Cross-functional Responsibilities:
Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives.
Support the rollout of new digital products and services.
Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting.
Reporting and Documentation:
Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems.
Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred).
Experience:
Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role.
Technical Competencies:
Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems.
Experience in settlement and dispute management.
Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.
Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms.
Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage.
Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS).
Other Skills:
Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities.
Excellent communication and coordination skills.
Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-018 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.

About FMFB-A:
As a background, FMFB-A started its operation in 2004, and is part of the Aga Khan Agency for Microfinance (AKAM), which has financial institutions operating in different countries throughout the world. For more information, please visit our website: www.fmfb.com.af .

Job Descriptions
Job Summary:
The Oracle Solaris System Administrator will be responsible for setting up servers, installing servers, creating and implementing Linux configurations, networking servers, and troubleshooting.
The Oracle Solaris System Administrator looks after design, installation, maintenance, and retirement of the systems, application server, WebLogic Server, data, security of the systems that are at the core of the organization, This role is responsible for the Technical and server Administration for infrastructure: Designing, building and implementing IT infrastructure; Proving timely and high-quality completion of projects (Tasks and request and ensuring the IT infrastructure environment is up to data through proactive auditing and Patch management.
Position Duties and Responsibilities:
Install, configure, upgrade, maintain, and troubleshoot Solaris, Linux, and Windows servers, operating systems, applications, and related infrastructure.
Manage Production (PR) and Disaster Recovery (DR) environments, including load balancing, server migration, resource sharing, high availability, redundancy, backups, and business continuity solutions.
Administer user accounts, Active Directory, storage systems (SAN, NAS, Oracle ZFS), virtual machines, and data center infrastructure.
Monitor system performance, availability, security, backups, patches, upgrades, and disaster recovery readiness to ensure maximum uptime and operational efficiency.
Provide technical support, automate routine administration tasks, maintain documentation, and manage incident and outage reporting.
Administer Oracle FCCM, Oracle OBDX, Oracle WebLogic Servers, Smart Banking systems, and other enterprise applications.
Collaborate with IT Security, Network, and vendor teams to maintain infrastructure integrity, security, compliance, and performance.
Monitor data center operations, maintain standards and procedures, and recommend infrastructure improvements and technology upgrades.
Data Center Responsibilities:
Oversee daily health monitoring and reporting of core data center infrastructure.
Maintain documentation and event logs for processes and activities.
Provide recommendations for procuring new data center equipment as needed.
Keeping track of developing trends in data center technologies.
Collaborating with IT Security and network teams on cybersecurity and network efficiency.
Make sure the Data Center standard procedure followed by the team, units and vendor
efficiently.

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Minimum 5 years of experience in Solaris, Linux, Unix, and Windows system administration within enterprise or data center environments.
Strong knowledge of Active Directory, PowerShell scripting, virtualization, storage technologies, server hardware, operating systems, networking, security, and disaster recovery.
Excellent communication, documentation, reporting, and problem-solving skills.

Please make sure that your email includes the vacancy ID as the subject line.
Note that, only the candidates who are meeting the requirements of the position will be shortlisted.
Form more information, please vist the FMFB-A's website: Website

vacancies@fmfb.com.af
Apply

tech_banking_jobs.title: Finance Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About Hindukush Bridge ICT-Services Company
HKB-ICT is a leading internet and communication company aiming to make Afghanistan go online in ten coming years.
Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company is a Kabul-based company specializing in providing internet services to NOGs, Government, local offices, and Home Users in Afghanistan. This company is 100% Afghan-owned and a team of highly qualified professionals having over a decade of experience in the various areas of ISP and ICT sector with different national and international organizations manages its operations.
Hindukush Bridge has a great partnership with most of the main players in the satellite and telecom industry. We are offering many added-value services to our partner/customer all over Afghanistan, along with a 24/7 hours Network Operation Center.
Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company functioning under a valid License Number (66724) issued by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry by the name of Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company the Company has professional and technical staff in various fields such as surveying, analyzing, budget estimation, project management, reporting and documentation, data-related issues.

Job Descriptions
Working with HKB-ICT requires full sort of work experience, strong interpersonal skills, good orientation towards working with people in group or lonely, strong intentions to work and grow, able to under loads and be task oriented.
The postholder will lead the development of our portfolio in Afghanistan, including identifying future business development opportunities and overseeing the writing of new project proposals. The post holder will ensure effective office management so that all functions are carried out in line with organization rules, local regulatory requirements and HKB-ICT guidelines.
The role of the Finance Officer involves providing financial and administrative support to colleagues, clients and stakeholders of the business. It’s a role that may attract applicants keen to move up the financial corporate ladder; those with ambitions of being Finance Officers, or even the CFO one day.
Finance Officer job description should highlight the need for candidates who are focused on outcomes, excellent problem solvers and strong communicators.
You must be able to form and cultivate effective relationships huge range of customer at all levels, which will be considered as key to your success. You should be able to manage effective teamwork.
You must also have strong presentation, negotiation, and communication skills, be able to make decisions concerning finance finance goals and be able to manage multiple priorities simultaneously.
Finance or Economics
Accounting
Business Administration
Mathematics
KEY KNOWLEDGE THAT MAKES YOU A BETTER CANDIDATE:
SAP (Preferred)
QuickBooks (Must)
Ms. Office (Must)
oddo (Preffered)

Job Requirements
A compassionate and inspirational finance officer, you’ll need to bring substantial experience in the management, interpersonal skills, motivation to work under various circumstances and develop new customers for the organization as per the guidelines provided by the senior executives.
This remains highly important that you should be able to manage large-scale of work and load, face different challenges and work complexities, with strong and proven quality to deliver high-quality representation of the company to the society within the deadline and budget.
Beyond these critical, core areas of skills and experience, you will also have to:
Managing the budget : this includes forecasting future income and expenses, creating budgets and balance sheets, and ensuring that spending is within budget limits.
Preparing financial reports: financial reports provide an overview of the company's financial status and performance. They are used to make critical business decisions, assess risk, and secure financing.
Conducting financial transactions: a Finance Officer oversees all financial transactions, including issuing payments, collecting debts, and investing money.
Ensuring compliance with financial regulations and laws: Finance Officers must comply with all relevant economic rules and regulations in Australia and overseas. This includes ensuring that financial records are accurate and up-to-date.
Using accounting software: this is to keep an accurate record of all internal and external business financial transactions and perform financial audits wherever necessary.

tech_banking_jobs.title: IT & Systems Security Officer
tech_banking_jobs.company: Afghan Barakat Financial Services Company ( Barakat Pay )
tech_banking_jobs.salary: Negotiable Based on Qualification and Experience
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About Afghan Barakat Financial Services Company ( Barakat Pay )
BarakatPay is an emerging Electronic Money Institution (EMI) project committed to delivering secure, innovative, and accessible digital financial services in Afghanistan. The company aims to strengthen financial inclusion and support the development of the country's digital payment ecosystem through technology, regulatory compliance, and operational excellence.
BarakatPay is committed to maintaining high standards of information security, corporate governance, risk management, customer protection, and regulatory compliance.

Job Descriptions
BarakatPay is an Electronic Money Institution (EMI) project being established in Afghanistan to provide secure, reliable, and innovative digital financial services. The company is developing electronic payment solutions for customers, merchants, agents, corporate clients, NGOs, and payment ecosystem partners under a regulated financial framework.
BarakatPay is seeking a qualified and responsible IT & Systems Security Officer to support the organization's technology infrastructure, system security controls, user access management, cloud coordination, technical documentation, and operational readiness. The position plays an important role in maintaining secure and efficient IT operations while supporting compliance with regulatory and internal security requirements.
The successful candidate will work closely with management, compliance, operations, technology vendors, and external service providers to ensure proper administration of systems, devices, security controls, and technical records.
Key Responsibilities:
• Support daily IT operations, system monitoring, and technical coordination activities.
• Maintain user access records, email accounts, system accounts, and access change logs.
• Assist in implementing password management, multi-factor authentication (MFA), device control, and access security procedures.
• Coordinate with cloud, hosting, network, SMS, domain, email, and software service providers.
• Maintain backup records, disaster recovery documentation, and system availability evidence.
• Support documentation and maintenance of IT policies, cybersecurity procedures, system inventories, and technical controls.
• Maintain records of IT assets including laptops, desktops, mobile devices, tablets, routers, SIM cards, and company equipment.
• Support employee onboarding and offboarding related to system access and technology resources.
• Monitor basic security alerts, suspicious activities, login issues, and device-related incidents.
• Assist with system testing, user acceptance testing (UAT), issue tracking, and reporting.
• Support regulator-facing IT and information security documentation.
• Ensure confidential company and customer information is handled securely.
• Assist in website, domain, email, cloud dashboard, and internal system administration activities.
• Maintain proper records of incidents, approvals, corrective actions, and system changes.

Job Requirements
Required Qualifications and Experience:
• Bachelor's degree or diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, Network Administration, Cybersecurity, Information Systems, or a related field.
• Educational qualifications must be obtained from a recognized institution and officially recognized or verified by the Ministry of Higher Education of Afghanistan. Foreign degrees must be supported by an equivalency certificate issued by the Ministry of Higher Education.
• Minimum two (2) to three (3) years of relevant professional experience in IT operations, system administration, network support, cloud support, cybersecurity support, software support, or technical operations.
• Basic understanding of cybersecurity principles, user access management, password controls, backups, MFA, antivirus solutions, firewalls, and system monitoring.
• Good computer skills, including MS Office, email systems, Google Workspace or Microsoft 365, PDF/document management, and troubleshooting.
• Good written and verbal communication skills in English.
• Fluency in Dari and/or Pashto.
• Ability to follow technical procedures, maintain records accurately, and handle confidential information responsibly.
• Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and ability to work effectively under supervision.
Preferred Qualifications:
• Previous experience in a bank, financial institution, fintech company, telecom operator, ISP, software company, cloud service provider, or regulated organization.
• Experience working with cloud platforms, hosting environments, Linux/Windows servers, VPN solutions, firewalls, backup systems, or monitoring tools.
• Familiarity with Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, domain management, DNS administration, email security, and user account administration.
• Knowledge of ISO 27001, information security management, incident management, IT risk management, or audit-related documentation.
• Professional certifications in Cybersecurity, Networking, Cloud Computing, System Administration, or IT Support will be considered an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are requested to submit the following documents:
Updated Curriculum Vitae (CV)
Copy of National ID (e-Tazkira)
Educational Certificates, Degrees, or Diplomas
Recent Passport-size Photograph
Relevant IT, Networking, Cloud, or Cybersecurity Certificates
Employment References
Applications should be submitted to:
Email: careers@barakatpay.af
Email Subject:
IT & Systems Security Officer – Application
For further information regarding this vacancy, applicants may contact us via WhatsApp.
WhatsApp: +93(0)700319789
Applications must be submitted through the above email address. For additional information or inquiries regarding this vacancy, applicants may contact us via WhatsApp.

Submission Email
careers@barakatpay.af
Apply

• Good computer skills, including MS Office, email systems, Google Workspace or Microsoft 365, PDF/document management, and troubleshooting.
• Good written and verbal communication skills in English.
• Fluency in Dari and/or Pashto.
• Ability to follow technical procedures, maintain records accurately, and handle confidential information responsibly.
• Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and ability to work effectively under supervision.
Preferred Qualifications:
• Previous experience in a bank, financial institution, fintech company, telecom operator, ISP, software company, cloud service provider, or regulated organization.
• Experience working with cloud platforms, hosting environments, Linux/Windows servers, VPN solutions, firewalls, backup systems, or monitoring tools.
• Familiarity with Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, domain management, DNS administration, email security, and user account administration.
• Knowledge of ISO 27001, information security management, incident management, IT risk management, or audit-related documentation.
• Professional certifications in Cybersecurity, Networking, Cloud Computing, System Administration, or IT Support will be considered an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are requested to submit the following documents:
Updated Curriculum Vitae (CV)
Copy of National ID (e-Tazkira)
Educational Certificates, Degrees, or Diplomas
Recent Passport-size Photograph
Relevant IT, Networking, Cloud, or Cybersecurity Certificates
Employment References
Applications should be submitted to:
Email: careers@barakatpay.af
Email Subject:
IT & Systems Security Officer – Application
For further information regarding this vacancy, applicants may contact us via WhatsApp.
WhatsApp: +93(0)700319789
Applications must be submitted through the above email address. For additional information or inquiries regarding this vacancy, applicants may contact us via WhatsApp.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Site Branch Manager
tech_banking_jobs.category: Economy, Information Technology, Finance, Business Administration
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه:
هدف این بست مدیریت دفتر ساحوی نقدپی در داخل بازار صرافی و حمایت از تمام فعالیت ‌ های عملیاتی تأیید شده نقدپی در سطح بازار است . مسئول موظف است مشتریان، اجنت ‌ ها و صرافان را ثبت ‌ نام کند، معلومات ابتدایی خدمات را ارائه نماید، به پرسش ‌ های مرتبط با تراکنش ‌ ها پاسخ دهد، مشکلات را ثبت کند، موارد لازم را به دیپارتمنت ‌ های مربوطه ارجاع دهد و گزارش ‌ های منظم را به مدیریت نقدپی ارائه کند .

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف و مسئولیت‌ها:
مدیر دفتر ساحوی (Site Branch Manager) تحت رهنمود مدیر بخش عملیاتی فعالیت نموده و مسئولیت‌های ذیل را بر عهده خواهد داشت:
1) توسعه بازار و جذب مشتریان (Business Acquisition):
شناسایی، تحلیل وجذب مشتریان جدید( MSP ها، تجار، شرکت‌ها).
ایجاد و توسعه فرصت‌های تجاری در مناطق هدف.
معرفی خدمات و راهکارهای شرکت نقدپی برای مشتریان بالقوه .
پیگیری مستمر فرصت‌ها تا مرحله نهایی (conversion).
2) مدیریت مشتریان و اجنت ها ( Agents & customers Management):
ایجاد وحفظ روابط مؤثر با مشتریان، اجنت ها و ذینفعان.
مدیریت جلسات حضوری و آنلاین جهت توسعه همکاری‌ها .
پیگیری نیازمندی‌های مشتریان، اجنت ها و ارائه راه‌ حل‌ های مناسب.
3) تحلیل بازار و فرصت‌ها (Market Analysis):
انجام تحقیقات بازار و تحلیل رقبا در بخش فین‌تک و خدمات مالی دیجیتال .
شناسایی فرصت‌های جدید تجاری و پیشنهاد به مدیریت .
جمع‌آوری معلومات از بازار و ارائه گزارش‌های تحلیلی .
4) هماهنگی داخلی و پشتیبانی فروش (Sales Coordination):
هماهنگی با تیم‌های تخنیکی، عملیات، مالی و مارکیتینگ جهت پیشبرد فرصت‌ها .
هماهنگی و پیگیری مشکلات اجنت ها و مشتریان با دیپارتمنت مربوطه نقدپی .
اطمینان از تطبیق درست خدمات برای مشتریان جدید .
5) بازاریابی و تقویت برند (Marketing & Visibility):
حمایت از فعالیت‌های بازاریابی در سطح ولایات .
مشارکت در معرفی خدمات از طریق ایونت‌ها، جلسات و بازدیدها .
جمع‌آوری بازخورد بازار برای بهبود خدمات .
6) گزارش‌دهی و مستندسازی (Reporting & Documentation):
ثبت و مدیریت معلومات مشتریان، فرصت‌ها و فعالیت‌ها .
ارائه گزارش‌های منظم از فعالیت‌ها.
مستندسازی جلسات، توافقات و پیشرفت‌ها .
تحویلات (Deliverables):
دستیابی به اهداف تعیین‌شده در جذب مشتریان وتوسعه بازار.
ایجاد و مدیریت فعال فرصت‌های تجاری.
ارائه گزارش‌های منظم از فعالیت‌ها، فرصت‌ها و نتایج .
توسعه وحفظ روابط مؤثر با مشتریان و شرکا کلیدی.
صلاحیت‌ها و مهارت‌های مورد نیاز
شایستگی‌های عمومی:
توانایی توسعه بازار و ایجاد فرصت‌های تجاری در محیط‌های رقابتی .
مهارت قوی در برقراری ارتباط، مذاکره و مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا.
· مهارت قوی در ارتباطات و هماهنگی.
· برخورد مناسب و مسلکی با مشتریان.
· امانت‌داری و حفظ محرمانگی.
· دقت در مستندسازی و گزارش‌دهی.
· رفتار مسلکی با مشتریان، اجنت‌ها، صرافان و نمایندگان بازار.
· توانایی پیروی از پالیسی‌ها، طرزالعمل‌ها و الزامات تطبیق نقدپی.
مهارت‌های فنی و مسلکی :
آشنایی با مفاهیم فین‌تک، پول الکترونیکی ( E-Money )، وخدمات مالی دیجیتال.
درک عملی از سیستم‌های پرداخت، POS ، و اکوسیستم‌های مالی .
مهارت در تهیه پروپوزل‌ها، پریزنتیشن‌ها واسناد تجاری.
توانایی تحلیل بازار، شناسایی فرصت‌ها و ارزیابی رقبا .
مهارت در مدیریت فروش و پیگیری فرصت‌ها تا نهایی‌سازی.
مهارت‌های قوی در زبان‌های دری/پشتو و انگلیسی (نوشتار و گفتار) .
توانایی تهیه گزارش‌های منظم، دقیق و مبتنی بر داده .

Job Requirements
تحصیلات و تجربه:
حداقل لیسانس در رشته‌های اداره تجارت، مالی، اقتصاد، IT یا رشته‌های مرتبط .
حداقل ۳ – ۵ سال تجربه کاری در بخش توسعه تجارت، فروش، یا مارکیتینگ ( ترجیحاً در فین‌تک، بانکداری یا ICT).
داشتن تجربه عملی در جذب مشتریان، مدیریت روابط، و دستیابی به اهداف فروش .

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان علاقه‌مند می‌توانند سی‌وی (CV) خود را با ذکر تجربه‌ های کاری مرتبط به ایمیل آدرس زیر ارسال نمایند: hr@naqdpay.af

tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
استاد کادر دایمی مسؤولیت تدریس مضامین مربوط به رشته تخصصی خویش، تهیه پلان درسی، ارزیابی فعالیت‌های علمی و آموزشی محصلان، سهم‌گیری در امور اکادمیک پوهنحی و ارتقای کیفیت تدریس را به عهده دارد. موصوف مکلف است مطابق نصاب تحصیلی منظورشده، لکچرها، امتحانات، کارهای عملی و فعالیت‌های تحقیقی را تنظیم و تطبیق نماید. همچنان استاد کادر دایمی در برنامه‌های علمی، سیمینارها، تحقیق، راهنمایی محصلان، انکشاف نصاب و سایر امور محوله از طرف پوهنحی و پوهنتون همکاری فعال می‌نماید.

Duties and Responsibilities
استاد کادر دایمی یکی از اعضای مهم اکادمیک پوهنتون بوده و مسؤولیت دارد تا در بخش‌های تدریس، تحقیق، ارتقای کیفیت، راهنمایی محصلان و تطبیق برنامه‌های علمی و اکادمیک مطابق لوایح و مقررات وزارت تحصیلات عالی و پالیسی‌های پوهنتون ایفای وظیفه نماید. وظایف و مسؤولیت‌های عمده استاد کادر دایمی قرار ذیل می‌باشد :
تدریس مضامین مربوط به رشته تخصصی خویش مطابق نصاب تحصیلی منظورشده و پلان درسی پوهنتون .
تهیه و ترتیب پلان درسی، لکچر نوت، مواد آموزشی، منابع درسی و سایر وسایل کمک‌آموزشی جهت بهبود روند تدریس .
استفاده از میتودهای معیاری، مؤثر و نوین تدریس به منظور بلند بردن سطح فهم، مهارت و مشارکت محصلان در صنف .
ارزیابی منظم محصلان از طریق امتحانات وسط سمستر و نهایی، کارخانگی، پریزنتیشن، پروژه‌های تحقیقی، فعالیت‌های صنفی و سایر روش‌های اکادمیک .
تهیه سوالات امتحانی مطابق معیارهای علمی، اخذ امتحانات، تصحیح پارچه‌ها، ثبت نمرات و ارائه نتایج محصلان در زمان معین .
راهنمایی علمی و اکادمیک محصلان در زمینه درس، تحقیق، مونوگراف، پروژه‌های علمی و سایر فعالیت‌های آموزشی .
سهم‌گیری فعال در امور تضمین کیفیت، تطبیق معیارهای اکادمیک، تهیه اسناد مورد نیاز، گزارش‌دهی و همکاری در پروسه‌های ارزیابی داخلی و خارجی پوهنتون .
همکاری نزدیک و دوامدار با رئیس پوهنحی و آمر دیپارتمنت در تطبیق پلان‌های درسی، برنامه‌های اکادمیک، امور تدریسی، تحقیقاتی و اداری مربوط به دیپارتمنت و پوهنحی .
اشتراک فعال در جلسات دیپارتمنت، پوهنحی، کمیته‌های علمی، کمیته تضمین کیفیت و سایر کمیته‌های مربوطه پوهنتون .
سهم‌گیری در انکشاف، بازنگری و بهبود نصاب تحصیلی، کورس پالیسی‌ها، پلان‌های درسی و مواد آموزشی مطابق نیازهای علمی و بازار کار .
انجام فعالیت‌های تحقیقی، نوشتن مقالات علمی، تهیه آثار اکادمیک و اشتراک در سیمینارها، ورکشاپ‌ها، کنفرانس‌ها و برنامه‌های علمی .
همکاری در برگزاری برنامه‌های علمی، سیمینارها، ورکشاپ‌ها، کنفرانس‌ها، نمایشگاه‌های علمی و سایر فعالیت‌های اکادمیک پوهنتون .
رعایت نظم، حاضری منظم، اوقات کاری، اصول تدریس و رفتار مسلکی در محیط اکادمیک .
ایجاد فضای سالم، محترمانه و علمی در صنف و تشویق محصلان به تحقیق، مطالعه، خلاقیت و تفکر انتقادی .
تهیه گزارش‌های علمی، تدریسی، تحقیقی و اکادمیک طبق نیاز دیپارتمنت، پوهنحی و اداره پوهنتون .
همکاری در جمع‌آوری، ترتیب و نگهداری اسناد اکادمیک مربوط به مضامین، پلان‌های درسی، حاضری محصلان، نمرات و سایر اسناد مورد نیاز .
رعایت اصول، لوایح، طرزالعمل‌ها، مقررات و رهنمودهای وزارت تحصیلات عالی و پوهنتون .
اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط که از طرف آمر دیپارتمنت، رئیس پوهنحی و رهبری پوهنتون به وی سپرده می‌شود .

Job Requirements
متقاضی بست استاد کادر دایمی باید واجد شرایط ذیل باشد:
داشتن حداقل سند تحصیلی ماستری در رشته مربوطه؛ سند دکتورا مزیت محسوب می‌گردد .
داشتن تجربه تدریس در نهادهای دولتی و خصوصی .
توانایی تدریس مضامین مسلکی مطابق نصاب تحصیلی و پلان درسی .
توانایی تهیه مواد درسی، سوالات امتحانی و ارزیابی محصلان .
داشتن توانایی تحقیق، مقاله‌نویسی و راهنمایی علمی محصلان .
آشنایی با پروسه‌های تضمین کیفیت و همکاری در امور اکادمیک .
داشتن مهارت‌های خوب ارتباطی، کار تیمی و رفتار مسلکی .
آشنایی با کمپیوتر و زبان‌های رسمی کشور؛ دانستن زبان انگلیسی مزیت است .
رعایت لوایح وزارت تحصیلات عالی و پالیسی‌های پوهنتون .

Submission Guidelines
علاقه‌مندان واجد شرایط می‌توانند درخواست خویش را همراه با خلص سوانح، کاپی اسناد تحصیلی، تذکره/کارت هویت و سایر اسناد مرتبط، الی تاریخ تعیین‌شده از طریق ایمیل یا به‌صورت حضوری به بخش منابع بشری پوهنتون ارسال نمایند.
در عنوان ایمیل باید نام بست و Vacancy no را به‌گونه واضح ذکر گردد. تنها با نامزدان واجد شرایط تماس گرفته خواهد شد.
